title: Jump Starter Power Pack, 4-IN-1 Car Battery Booster (Up to 8.5L Gas or 5.0L Diesel Engine) with Leads, Portable Car Jump Starter Power Bank with USB Fast-Charging Port and LED Flashlight
features: 【Quick Car Start】Get your car running in just 10s! Our jump starter power pack delivers a peak current of up to 1600A, perfect for emergency situations when your car battery dies. With this car battery booster jump starter, you can get your car, SUV or motorcycle back up and running yourself when it conks out unexpectedly - no more hanging about for hours waiting for roadside recovery.(up to 8.5L gas or 5.0L diesel engines)

【Enhanced Protection for Your Car】Our car Battery Booster Jump Starter features upgraded smart jumper cables with 10 integrated safety protections, designed to shield your vehicle’s engine from overcurrent, overheating, short circuits, overvoltage, overcharging, and more. It prevent reverse polarity accidents, making it safer and easier to use than traditional jumper cables, even for beginners.

【4-in-1 Multi-Functional Car Jump Starter】This car jump starter power bank isn't just for starting cars, it also serves as a portable power bank. Equipped with a USB fast-charging port (9V/2A) that rapidly charges your mobile phone and other devices to full capacity in minimal time. It also includes an emergency flashlight with three modes (light, strobe, SOS) and a compass, making it a handy tool for outdoor travel.

【Intelligent Charge Preservation】Our car battery booster jump starter adopts the recent MCU precision control technology, with a standby power consumption of microamperes. Even if you place a fully charged jump starter power pack in the trunk of your car and don't use it for a year, the charge level can be maintained at over 95%. With a smart display, it can accurately display the remaining power and output mode at a glance.

【What Will You Get? 】Only 0.78 kg battery jump starter × 1, jump leads × 1, portable handbag × 1, USB charging cable × 1, user manual × 1 and lifetime technical support. If you encounter any problem you don't know how to use or the product doesn't work, please get in touch with us and we will provide you with a solution.
description: Product Description NOTE: When using it for the first time, please charge the car starter power pack first to avoid failure to start the vehicle due to insufficient power after long-term transportation. Make sure the starter has more than 80% power when used to start the car. When using the starter, make sure the jumper clip plug is firmly inserted into the starter. Otherwise, the starter will not start your car and may damage the starter. Make sure the battery clamps are in good contact with the battery terminals. If the starter still fails to start your car after 3 attempts, stop and check if there are other possible problems. (such as whether the green light is displayed on the jumper clamp) If you encounter any problem that you don't know how to use or the product doesn't work, please feel free to tell us and we will provide you with a solution.
